title: Honey Garlic Salmon & Rice
description: A quick and easy family-friendly meal featuring tender salmon glazed with a sweet and savory honey garlic sauce, served alongside fluffy rice. Perfect for a weeknight dinner with minimal cleanup.
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together honey, soy sauce, minced garlic, and lemon juice to make the glaze.
Season salmon fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat. Sear salmon skin-side down for 2-3 minutes until crispy. Flip the salmon.
Pour the honey garlic glaze over the salmon. Add broccoli florets to the skillet around the salmon.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 12-15 minutes, or until salmon is cooked through and flakes easily.
While salmon bakes, cook rice according to package directions. (Typically 1 cup rice to 2 cups water, simmer for 15-20 minutes).
Serve the honey garlic salmon and broccoli immediately with the cooked rice.
tips: For extra flavor, marinate the salmon in half of the honey garlic glaze for 15-30 minutes before searing.
If your kids are picky about broccoli, you can substitute with green beans or peas, or roast the broccoli separately to achieve desired tenderness.
Ensure the salmon is not overcooked to keep it moist and tender. It should flake easily with a fork.
